script: const getAudioPath=async(text,speed,dirPath,config)=>{const path=require('path');const fs=require('fs');let audioName=new Date().getTime()+'.wav';if(!fs.existsSync(path.join(dirPath,'tts'))){fs.mkdirSync(path.join(dirPath,'tts'));}const audioData=await getTTSAudio(text,speed,config);fs.writeFileSync(path.join(dirPath,'tts',audioName),audioData);return path.join(dirPath,'tts',audioName);};const getTTSAudio=async(text,speed,config)=>{const apiKey=config.apiKey||'';const model=config.model||'qwen3-tts-flash';const voice=config.voiceName||'Cherry';const baseUrl=config.baseUrl||'https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com/api/v1';const axios=require('axios');const body={model:model,input:{text:text,voice:voice},parameters:{stream:false}};if(speed&&speed!==1.0){body.parameters.speech_rate=Math.round((speed-1)*500);}const url=baseUrl+'/services/aigc/multimodal-generation/generation';return new Promise((resolve,reject)=>{axios.post(url,body,{headers:{Authorization:'Bearer '+apiKey,'Content-Type':'application/json','X-DashScope-DataInspection':'enable'}}).then(async(response)=>{console.log(response.data);const audioUrl=response.data&&response.data.output&&response.data.output.audio&&response.data.output.audio.url;if(!audioUrl){reject('No audio URL in response');return;}const audioResponse=await axios.get(audioUrl,{responseType:'arraybuffer'});resolve(Buffer.from(audioResponse.data));}).catch((error)=>{console.log(error);reject('');});});};const getTTSVoice=async(config)=>{const voices=[{name:'Cherry',gender:'female',locale:'zh-CN',displayName:'Qwen TTS - Cherry (zh-CN/en) - Female'},{name:'Serena',gender:'female',locale:'zh-CN',displayName:'Qwen TTS - Serena (zh-CN/en) - Female'},{name:'Ethan',gender:'male',locale:'zh-CN',displayName:'Qwen TTS - Ethan (zh-CN/en) - Male'},{name:'Chelsie',gender:'female',locale:'zh-CN',displayName:'Qwen TTS - Chelsie (zh-CN/en) - Female'},{name:'Momo',gender:'female',locale:'zh-CN',displayName:'Qwen TTS - Momo (zh-CN/en) - Female'},{name:'Vivian',gender:'female',locale:'zh-CN',displayName:'Qwen TTS - Vivian (zh-CN/en) - Female'},{name:'Moon',gender:'male',locale:'zh-CN',displayName:'Qwen TTS - Moon (zh-CN/en) - Male'},{name:'Maia',gender:'female',locale:'zh-CN',displayName:'Qwen TTS - Maia (zh-CN/en) - Female'},{name:'Kai',gender:'male',locale:'zh-CN',displayName:'Qwen TTS - Kai (zh-CN/en) - Male'},{name:'Nofish',gender:'male',locale:'zh-CN',displayName:'Qwen TTS - Nofish (zh-CN/en) - Male'},{name:'Bella',gender:'female',locale:'zh-CN',displayName:'Qwen TTS - Bella (zh-CN/en) - Female'},{name:'Jennifer',gender:'female',locale:'zh-CN',displayName:'Qwen TTS - Jennifer (zh-CN/en) - Female'},{name:'Ryan',gender:'male',locale:'zh-CN',displayName:'Qwen TTS - Ryan (zh-CN/en) - Male'},{name:'Neil',gender:'male',locale:'zh-CN',displayName:'Qwen TTS - Neil (zh-CN/en) - Male'},{name:'Elias',gender:'female',locale:'zh-CN',displayName:'Qwen TTS - Elias (zh-CN/en) - Female'},{name:'Sunny',gender:'female',locale:'zh-SC',displayName:'Qwen TTS - Sunny (zh-SC) - Female'},{name:'Dylan',gender:'male',locale:'zh-BJ',displayName:'Qwen TTS - Dylan (zh-BJ) - Male'},{name:'Jada',gender:'female',locale:'zh-SH',displayName:'Qwen TTS - Jada (zh-SH) - Female'},{name:'Rocky',gender:'male',locale:'zh-YUE',displayName:'Qwen TTS - Rocky (zh-YUE) - Male'},{name:'Kiki',gender:'female',locale:'zh-YUE',displayName:'Qwen TTS - Kiki (zh-YUE) - Female'}];return voices.map((v)=>({name:v.name,gender:v.gender,locale:v.locale,displayName:v.displayName,plugin:'qwen-tts-voice-plugin',config:{...config,voiceName:v.name}}));};global.getAudioPath=getAudioPath;global.getTTSVoice=getTTSVoice;
